positive: A stylized, symmetrical vector illustration of a group of constellations forming a narrative scene, specifically featuring a stylized crescent moon cradling a nebula-filled celestial fox. The fox has large, luminous eyes and elegant, flowing fur made of starlight. The background deep space gradient is rendered in deep sapphire, indigo, and teal tones, contrasted by sharp, ethereal lines of electric turquoise and gold stardust. The overall composition should be clean and graphically impactful, suitable for printing on fabric. Utilize strong, bold silhouettes and fine line work, with geometric accents incorporated into the surrounding stars and zodiac signs. Mythical, cosmic, modern tattoo aesthetic, high contrast, flat graphic design, vector art.
